title: Wither Storm Neo
description: A lightweight modpack revolving around Cracker's Wither Storm Mod offering optimizations, QOL, and more.
body:
# Wither Storm Neo
This modpack attempts to provide the best experience of Cracker's Wither Storm Mod possible without altering the overall gameplay.

## Features/improvements

### Optimization
- Neoforge - Faster fork of Forge.
- Rubidium/Embeddium - Port of Sodium, allows for fine-tuned control over the graphics settings as well as just general optimizations.
- Clumps - Merges XP orbs together to reduce the amount of entities.
- Memory Leak Fix - Stops common memory leaks that could cause minecraft to run out of RAM.
- Dynamic FPS - Lowers resource usage when you are tabbed out or afk.
- Noisium - Faster worldgen.

### Quality of Life
- AppleSkin - Shows how much health/hunger will be regenerated when holding food.
- Controlling - Searchable controls menu.
- Just Enough Items - Better recipe lookup.
- Jade - Provides info about the block you are looking at.
- Zume - A simple zoom keybind.
- Simple Voice Chat - An in-game proximity chat. Great for immersion.
- e4mc - Easily forward your LAN world to play with friends.

### Aesthetics
- Ambient Sounds - Some extra sound effects that help set the mood of whatever area you're in.
- Better Foliage Renewed - Adds leaf particles, changes the way grass blocks tile, and makes plants/leaves more 3D.
- Oculus - Shader support (disabled by default). This modpack comes prepackaged with Complementary and BSL.
- Sound Physics Remastered - Amazing for immersion, makes caves feel more real. Also works well with Simple Voice Chat.
- Wavey Capes - Small change to capes that makes them move more like cloth.
- Enhanced Boss Bars - Revamps the texture for the Wither Storm boss bar.
- TAW/TAW+ - Revamps models and animations to make them more accurate to Minecraft Story Mode.
- VN4's Fresh Wither Storm - Many improvements to the animations and textures. Fully compatible with TAW.
- Fresh Animations - Better animations on mobs. Integrates with VN4's Fresh Wither Storm.

### Worldgen
- Terralith - Adds biomes that look nice with Better Foliage. Does not add any new blocks to the game.
- Lost Cities - An optional world type if you want to change up the scenery.
